structuredPlan.goal: Create a library-wide naming convention consistency analyzer that scores component adherence to library-wide naming patterns for events, properties, CSS custom properties, and attributes.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Library-wide prefix detection works across 5+ libraries (helix, Material Web, Carbon, Ionic, Shoelace)
Per-component scoring reflects adherence to library conventions
Event, property, CSS, and attribute naming all scored with correct point allocations
Graceful handling of libraries with no clear prefix pattern
Analyzer registered as dimension 14 in dimensions.ts with weight 5 and tier 'important'
Tests cover real library CEMs and deliberately inconsistent mock CEMs

tasks.title: Implement naming-consistency.ts analyzer core
tasks.description: Create packages/core/src/handlers/analyzers/naming-consistency.ts with methods for: detectLibraryEventPrefix(), scoreEventPrefixCoherence(), scorePropertyNamingConsistency(), scoreCSSCustomPropertyPrefixing(), scoreAttributePropertyCoherence(). Implement library-level prefix detection that analyzes all components before per-component scoring.

tasks.title: Register analyzer as dimension 14
tasks.description: Add naming-consistency analyzer to dimensions.ts as dimension 14 with weight 5, tier 'important', and confidence 'verified'. Ensure it appears in the dimensions export.

tasks.title: Wire analyzer into health.ts pipeline
tasks.description: Import and integrate the naming-consistency analyzer into the health.ts scoring pipeline. Call it with the full library CEM to enable library-wide prefix detection, then apply per-component scoring.

tasks.title: Create test suite with multi-library coverage
tasks.description: Develop tests/handlers/naming-consistency.test.ts covering: prefix detection for helix (hx-), Material Web (md-), Carbon (bx-), Ionic (ion-), and Shoelace (sl-); per-component scoring validation; edge cases (no events, no CSS properties); deliberately inconsistent mock CEMs; and confidence verification.

tasks.title: Verify integration and no regressions
tasks.description: Run full test suite to confirm naming-consistency analyzer integrates correctly, all acceptance criteria pass, and no existing tests are broken.

deviationRules.condition: Library has no clear naming prefix pattern across components
deviationRules.action: Detect dominant pattern or fall back to consistency-only scoring; return reduced confidence if pattern ambiguous
Exclude component from event prefix coherence denominator; do not penalize for missing events

deviationRules.condition: Component has no CSS custom properties
deviationRules.action: Exclude component from CSS custom property prefix denominator; do not penalize for missing CSS properties

deviationRules.condition: Attribute-property mapping has Web Component standard deviations (e.g., boolean attributes)
deviationRules.action: Apply lenient scoring rules for standard Web Component attribute patterns

deviationRules.condition: Library uses non-kebab-case attributes or non-camelCase properties
deviationRules.action: Skip attribute-property coherence scoring for that library with low confidence flag
